title: Exact Descriptive Statistics Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: descriptive statistics separate bad variance and bad contingency total regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact-rational and integer statistics contradictions: the sample [1,2,3,4] forces Var(X)=5/4 while the separate QF_LRA row rejects the fixed malformed claim 3/2, and the contingency row sums 10 and 10 force total = 20 but the malformed row claims total = 19.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional descriptive-statistics rows only when they add distinct integer-count or exact-rational solver pressure; keep inference, estimation, and numerical procedures in numerical-honesty metadata.

graduation_criteria: Encode exact finite descriptive-statistics checks as deterministic QF_LRA/LIA formulas.
Replay count-table and finite-data witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep malformed finite-statistic replay separate from checked QF_LRA/Farkas rows for isolated exact-rational contradictions.
Route inconsistent integer margin/count constraints through QF_LIA/Diophantine certificates.
Keep promoted impossible margin/count rows tied to checked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence.
Keep statistical inference and numerical estimation under explicit reproducibility metadata, not proof status.
Add exact finite-test examples only after the table helpers are reused by another statistics pack.
